comment.body: 4805.69 - 4910.22 weekly range; daily key levels at 4900 or so for upside pivot, matches with weekly range as well for a grind up if vol stabilizes/consolidation occurs. charm flip at 4992, upside stabilization can occur at 5121 if spot.vol realizes downwards; conditions for spx 4300 would be related to factors outside of the range and more on FED/ECB outcomes related to approach and if markets are introducing calming measures to stabilize or not

user.name: BT
user.bio: Options market profile order flow

comment.body:
1) 4805-910 target range: we expect vol selling and consolidation but what disproves this is vol, in fact with lower vol this line cannot be broken,  with high vol we will see another 200pt drop (minimum)…. Heading toward 4300-400.
2) the dynamic is a positive speed profile here, if his dynamic realises so spot up vol down, the downside will be hit, watching 4570. To the upside is 4900 with stabilisation above 5121. The positive speed profile suggests us (I guess) that the hidden flow could be on the way up if vol can realise and viceversa.
3) the conditions for reach 4300 are geopolitical, If US cannot realise his plan Holy Alliance, EU will come closer everyday to china, debt will be sold, us egemony will disappear, fed tied hands etc……… and boom vol event .
